title: Question banks #7-#10 across >= 3 subjects
context: M3 requires at least 10 banks adopted cumulatively across at least 3 subjects. Banks #7-#10 complete this target and demonstrate sustained throughput with the refresh process in place. The banks must span at least 3 distinct subject areas and use the full advanced item type repertoire. Source-drift checks from refresh-021 are applied to existing banks concurrently with new authoring.
objective: Author and deliver four additional question banks (banks #7-#10) spanning at least 3 subjects cumulatively, each passing all gates and adopted by a beneficiary.
acceptanceCriteria: Four banks authored and delivered spanning subjects such that the full portfolio covers at least 3 distinct subject areas.
Each source passed gate-003; coverage >= 90% of stated objectives; machine gate green; all human sign-offs recorded.
Each bank adopted with adoption evidence artifact committed.
Source-drift check (refresh-021) applied to all previously delivered banks concurrently; any stale items routed as maintenance tasks.
Per-bank effort logged; median compared to M1/M2 baseline.
resources: quiz-bank-open-refresh-021 (drift detection process — apply to existing banks)
output: Four complete, adopted question banks in canonical JSON + QTI 3.0 + Moodle exports, completing the 10-bank cumulative target across >= 3 subjects.
